summary: Comprehensive regression + edge-case test of (a) forgot-password anti-enumeration flow, (b) reset-password token-based flow (valid/invalid/replay/expired), (c) Family Circle invite email integration, and (d) Resend transactional email integration. All 14/14 backend pytest cases PASSED. Frontend forgot-password UI, ResetPasswordScreen deep link, password validation states (short/mismatch/invalid token/success), and URL stripping all verified visually. Resend integration confirmed delivering real email to ankitagada31@gmail.com (logged ids visible in backend.err.log) and silently failing for non-verified addresses while keeping API at 200. health_check.py = 14/14 HEALTHY.
tests_passed: POST /api/auth/forgot-password existing email -> creates password_resets row with token + expires_at ~60min in future + used:false (verified via pymongo)
POST /api/auth/reset-password invalid token -> 400 'Invalid or already-used reset link'
POST /api/auth/reset-password valid token -> 200 {ok, access_token, email, id}; old password fails login (401); new password succeeds (200)
POST /api/auth/reset-password expired token (expires_at mutated to past) -> 400 'Reset link expired'
POST /api/circle/members with email=ankitagada31@gmail.com -> 200 invite_email_sent=true; backend log shows 'INFO:perk_orbit.mailer:Email sent to=ankitagada31@gmail.com id=...'
POST /api/circle/members with unverified email -> 200 invite_email_sent=false (Resend ERROR logged but flow not broken)

Frontend AuthScreen 'Forgot password?' link (auth-forgot) switches to 'Reset your password' headline + email-only field + 'Send reset link' button; submit shows forgot-sent confirmation; auth-back returns to sign in

Frontend ResetPasswordScreen deep link (?reset_token=...) renders BEFORE auth gate; short pw shows 'at least 6 characters'; mismatched pw shows 'do not match'; invalid token shows 'Invalid or already-used reset link' in [data-testid=reset-error]; valid pw auto-signs user in and strips reset_token from URL (verified — landed on post-auth PIN setup screen)
critical_code_review_comments: auth_intel.py:288 — non-datetime expires_at branch raises 'Invalid reset link' which is a different error string than spec ('Reset link expired'); cosmetic only, never triggered in normal flow.

mailer.py — `result.get('id')` on Resend response assumes dict; resend SDK 2.x sometimes returns an object; consider `getattr(result, 'id', None) or (result.get('id') if isinstance(result, dict) else None)` for resilience.
server.py add_circle_member — `payload.email` not normalized (no .lower()/strip()); minor: invite_email_sent_at stored as ISO string while password_resets uses datetime — inconsistency.
auth_intel.py forgot_password — invalidates prior unused tokens by SET used:true but keeps `expires_at` — acceptable; could also clear token field to be defensive.

frontend ResetPasswordScreen — UI transitions through reset-success very briefly before next screen takes over; consider keeping reset-success visible for at least 1500ms for accessibility/observability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (forgot UI + reset deep link + invalid token error all verified)

test_credentials: test@perkorbit.app / Perk@1234 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). New test users dynamically created with unique random emails.
seed_data_creation: Dynamic per-test users created (forgot-pwd-test+*, reset-ok+*, reset-exp+*, reset-ui+*). Circle member test rows are deleted after each test via DELETE /api/circle/members/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Resend is in sandbox — only ankitagada31@gmail.com can receive real emails. Sends to any other address log ERROR but the API still returns 200 with invite_email_sent=false. This is verified expected behavior; do NOT treat the Resend ERROR logs for non-verified addresses as bugs. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_forgot_reset_and_invite.py uses pymongo (sync) for DB introspection — do not switch to motor or the event-loop conflicts will return. Onboarding tour blocks Circle tab on first PIN setup — to test CirclePage UI you must skip the tour first; backend tests cover the full add-with-email API surface anyway. Verified data-testid='circle-email' is present in /app/frontend/src/screens/CirclePage.jsx line 51, and the toast logic matches spec at line 27.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All 14 backend pytests pass; all four frontend assertions (forgot link, anti-enum confirmation, reset screen validations, invalid-token error) pass.
